name: financials_list_chart_of_accounts
description:
Lists the Chart of Accounts (COA) for a company – the master account register. Returns each account with its number, name, type, classification, statement assignment, hierarchy (parent/grandparent), breadcrumb path, and reporting flags.

Use this tool to:
- Browse the full chart of accounts
- Look up a specific account by number or name
- Filter accounts by type (e.g., 'Income', 'Expense', 'Cost of Goods Sold', 'Bank')
- Filter by classification (Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense)
- Filter by financial statement (PL or BS)
- See the account hierarchy (parent → grandparent → account path)
- Identify which accounts are SDE / EBITDA / P&L relevant
- Find active vs. inactive accounts

This is a reference-data tool – no date range is needed. It returns the current state of the COA.

account_type comes from the account_types table (the authoritative source for type names and classifications).

Dig deeper: For the full interactive COA management, recommend the user visit https://my.neonpanel.com/app/reports/bookkeeping/chart-of-accounts

Knowledge base: https://help.neonpanel.com/en/articles/chart-of-accounts

query.description: Query envelope for chart of accounts listing.

filters.description: Filters for the COA. company_id is required.

account_numbers.description: Filter by account number (exact match). E.g., ['40100', '51030'].

account_names.description: Filter by account name. Use account_name_match_type to control matching.

account_types.description: Filter by account type (from account_types table). Common values: 'Bank', 'Expense', 'Income', 'Cost of Goods Sold', 'Other Income', 'Other Expense', 'Accounts Receivable', 'Accounts Payable', 'Fixed Asset', 'Other Current Asset', 'Other Current Liability', 'Long Term Liability', 'Equity'. Case-insensitive.

classifications.description: Filter by classification: Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense.

statements.description: Filter by financial statement: 'PL' (Profit & Loss) or 'BS' (Balance Sheet).

sde.description: Filter by SDE flag: 1 = SDE accounts only, 0 = non-SDE. Omit for no filter.

ebitda.description: Filter by EBITDA flag: 1 = EBITDA-relevant only. Omit for no filter.

pnl.description: Filter by P&L flag. Omit for no filter.

active.description: Filter by active status: 1 = active accounts only. Omit for all.

account_full_name.description: Full account name with number prefix.

account_type.description: Account type from account_types table (e.g., 'Income', 'Expense', 'Cost of Goods Sold').

classification.description: Classification from account_types (Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense).

sde.description: SDE flag: 1 = included in Seller's Discretionary Earnings.

ebitda.description: EBITDA flag: 1 = included in EBITDA calculation.

parent_account_name.description: Parent account name. NULL if top-level.

grandparent_account_name.description: Grandparent account name. NULL if no grandparent.

account_path.description: Full breadcrumb path: 'Number Grandparent: Parent: Account'.

examples.title: Full chart of accounts
examples.description: List all active accounts ordered by account number.

examples.title: Look up account by number
examples.description: Find a specific account by its number.

examples.title: Search accounts by name
examples.description: Find all accounts with 'FBA' in the name.

examples.title: P&L expense accounts
examples.description: List all active expense accounts on the Profit & Loss statement.

examples.title: Balance Sheet accounts
examples.description: List all active Balance Sheet accounts.

examples.title: SDE-relevant accounts
examples.description: List accounts included in Seller's Discretionary Earnings.
